I checked your calendar for 2024-05-19. The 10:00–11:00 slot is already taken (Project Kick-off), and there’s a meeting at 11:00–11:30, so 10:00 isn’t available.

Options I can book instead (each 1 hour, same day):
- 09:00–10:00 (earliest available)
- 11:30–12:30 (immediately after your 11:00–11:30 meeting)
- Another afternoon time (please specify a preferred hour, e.g., 13:00–14:00 or 14:00–15:00)

Before I create the event, please confirm:
1) Which of the above times (or another time that day) do you want?  
2) Who should be invited (list of emails), or should it be just on your calendar?  
3) Short description text to include (or I can use a suggested one, e.g., "Follow-up to review action items and next steps").  
4) Any location or virtual meeting link to add?

Once you confirm those, I’ll create the event.
